code:
value Item
  name: String
  price: Int
end

let apple = Item(name: "apple", price: 120)
let bread = Item(name: "bread", price: 300)
let cheese = Item(name: "cheese", price: 480)

let cart = [apple, bread, cheese]

mut subtotal = 0
for item in cart
  subtotal = subtotal + item.price
end

mut total = subtotal
if subtotal >= 500
  total = subtotal - 100
end

println("subtotal=#{subtotal}")
println("total=#{total}")
